actionUnits.condition: Room2 (fileID 1271916000) currently shows no Rigidbody, Collider, EventTrigger, or attached MonoBehaviour with UnityEvent (m_Calls) in the provided scene JSON. Please provide the MonoBehaviour components (including script fileID, GUID, and m_Calls) attached to Room2 and its children so we can target public no-arg methods. We will treat the provided MonoBehaviour component data as the exact settings of the attached scripts to be tested.

MonoBehaviour (id 659474796) on Drawer (fileID 659474793) is the exact scene settings of the attached script DrawerController (m_Script guid 181a93ff91c685946b20f54ea877474b) with openDistance=0.42 and animationSpeed=5. Drawer has a BoxCollider (id 659474798) and no Rigidbody, so Trigger action is valid. Drawer’s Transform is parented under Cabinet (m_Father fileID 134420580) within Room2.
